name: Fabric Detail Closeup
commercial_use: Product detail gallery, luxury material storytelling, PDP support image
visual_goal: Highlight fabric texture, stitching, buttons, hardware, or construction quality.
composition: Tight crop on garment detail with enough context to understand where it sits on the body.
model_direction: Hold still, hands placed naturally if they help frame the detail.
styling_notes: Fabric must be clean, lint-free, and arranged to show craftsmanship.
lighting: Soft raking light across the fabric surface to reveal texture without harsh glare.
camera_language: Macro or 85mm close-focus look, shallow depth of field, precise focus on the detail.
prompt: High-end fashion product detail closeup showing fabric texture and garment construction, precise focus on stitching and material quality, soft raking studio light, premium commercial photography, elegant shallow depth of field.
negative_prompt: dirty fabric, loose threads, plastic texture, excessive blur, harsh glare, unreadable detail, artificial shine
